product_name: Union Bank of India — Account Opening
tagline: Open an Account with Union Bank, Build a Secure Future

account_types.best_for: Low income groups, first-time bankers, EWS
account_types.note: Basic Savings Bank Deposit — RBI mandated product

account_types.best_for: Financially excluded sections — rural, unbanked population

identity_proof: Aadhaar Card (OTP based eKYC also possible)
for_individual.pan_mandatory: PAN or Form 60 (if PAN not available) — mandatory for all accounts
for_individual.note: Video KYC is also available — no branch visit required

required: KYC documents of all joint holders
Joint account mandate — Either or Survivor / Former or Survivor
Business registration proof (GST, trade licence, partnership deed, MOA/AOA)

modes_of_opening.process: Fill the form, submit documents, account activates same day or next day
Apply via Union Bank website/app, schedule a Video KYC call
Download the app, open via Aadhaar OTP

nomination.who_can_be_nominee: Any individual — spouse, child, parent, sibling
nomination.note: Nominee receives funds after account holder's demise

insurance_benefits.jan_dhan: Accidental insurance ₹2 Lakh (RuPay card must be used for a purchase/transaction)
insurance_benefits.pmjjby: PM Jeevan Jyoti Bima — ₹330/year premium, ₹2 Lakh life cover (opt-in)
insurance_benefits.pmsby: PM Suraksha Bima — ₹20/year premium, ₹2 Lakh accidental cover (opt-in)

atm_withdrawals.other_bank_atm: 5 free per month (metro: 3 free), ₹21 per transaction after limit

charges.neft_rtgs: Free via Net Banking / Mobile Banking
charges.cheque_book: First 25 leaves free, then ₹4 per leaf
charges.minimum_balance_penalty: ₹100 to ₹500 per quarter depending on shortfall

process_steps.title: Understand Customer Profile
process_steps.detail: What is their occupation? What is their income source? Business owner? Student? Senior citizen? — This determines the right account type

process_steps.title: Recommend Account Type
process_steps.detail: Suggest the best account based on profile. Low income = BSBD/Jan Dhan. Business = Current. Salaried = Salary/Savings

process_steps.title: KYC Documents Verify
process_steps.detail: Check original documents, keep photocopies, verify Aadhaar OTP (eKYC preferred)

process_steps.title: Fill Application Forms
process_steps.detail: Account opening form, nomination form (DA1), FATCA declaration (if foreign income/citizenship applies)

process_steps.title: Initial Deposit
process_steps.detail: Minimum balance as per account type. Not required for zero balance accounts

process_steps.title: Account Activate & Kit Issue
process_steps.detail: Issue passbook, ATM card (delivery 7-10 days), Net Banking credentials

staff_tips: Jan Dhan accounts have ₹10,000 overdraft facility after 6 months — most customers are not aware
Always pitch PMJJBY (₹330) and PMSBY (₹20) — very few customers enroll
Mention the Video KYC option — convenient for elderly or busy customers
Ensure the nomination form is always filled — it prevents legal issues later
If the customer is a senior citizen, explain special privileges — priority service, doorstep banking
